title: Complex expression with comparison evaluates incorrectly in WHERE clause
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE complex_test (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, value1 INTEGER, value2 BOOLEAN, value3 VARCHAR(50));
INSERT INTO complex_test (id, value1, value2, value3) VALUES (1, 10, TRUE, 'test1');
INSERT INTO complex_test (id, value1, value2, value3) VALUES (2, 20, FALSE, 'test2');
SELECT ct.id, ct.value1 FROM complex_test ct WHERE (ct.value2 OR (ct.value1 < 15)) AND (ct.value3 IS NOT NULL);
SELECT ct.id FROM complex_test ct WHERE (ct.value1 > 25) AND (ct.value2 AND (ct.value1 = 10 OR ct.value3 IS NULL));
key_bug_features: Incorrect evaluation of complex expressions in WHERE clause
